name: First Baptist Blackshear MAC Bldg
description: First Baptist Blackshear MAC Bldg is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Blackshear, GA. There are 3 indoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts can be reserved.

name: Patterson Baptist Church
description: Patterson Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Patterson, GA. There are 2 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
